@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent added an unnecessary filter requiring papers to have publication year 2018 (see call_mWN53iPzeAUcaOHrz5iGHCC1 where r['year'] == 2018 is applied), which is not part of the query that only asks for ACM-published papers cited in 2018, causing zero matches and no average to be returned.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent used a naive regex search for "ACM" in the full text of paper_docs (call_K9UAnGyZQOwYIxsLv33vbQPz) to identify ACM-published papers and then averaged 2018 citations for only the two titles matched (call_eTGDaFRg4plfx2qIRa583Ysj), resulting in 68.5 instead of the true average that would come from correctly extracting the publisher.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent queried the correct 2018 citations and paper documents but implemented a faulty publisher extraction in execute_python (e.g., checking 'acm' in the case-sensitive text instead of a case-insensitive search), resulting in only 2 papers being identified as ACM and an incorrect average of 68.5.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent wrongly identified ACM-published papers by filtering Mongo documents whose full text merely contains the substring "ACM" (call_3rhr0PH8PI7k7kl8Ius4eUS8) and then averaged 2018 citation counts for those titles (call_qRYquB40A3tsXCZIGqUmpFJB and call_fZUIa2aHc5kiteMvKutOPTGX), missing the required step of accurately extracting and filtering by publisher=ACM.

The agent misidentified ACM-published papers by filtering paper_docs where the full text merely contains the substring "ACM" (call_Dsdvmyx7tVnG2UjZCdCj7LDL) instead of extracting and filtering by the publisher/source field, leading to an incorrect set of titles and thus a wrong average computed in execute_python.
